rows.description: Compotus Dñi Rectoris J. C. Jones a 2do die Novembris 1837. ad eundem diem revolutionis A. D. 1838.
rows.notes: Description primarily taken from 'gemini-flash' for 'Compotus', 'Dñi', and 'revolutionis', which visually align better with the original image than 'gpt-5-mini's readings. The overall text is clear despite some stylised handwriting. Amounts are correctly empty.
